---
title: Digital Reconstruction of Elmina Castle for Mobile Virtual Reality via Point-based
  Detail Transfer
author:
- Sifan Ye
- Ting Wu
- Michael Jarvis
- Yuhao Zhu
categories:
- Show All
- Work (Co-)Led by Horizon Lab
topics:
- comp_human
url_source: https://library.imaging.org/ei/articles/34/1/VDA-409
code_source: https://github.com/horizon-research/3D-Reconstruction-From-Point-Cloud
journ: IS&T EI (VDA)
year: 2022
contrib: Work (Co-)Led by Horizon Lab
image: featured.png
award: Kostas Pantazos Memorial Award for Outstanding Paper in Visualization and Data
  Analysis
pub_number: 57
---
